Apple tree in business park. Not maintained. Poor yield after prolonged hot\dry summer. Previous year I found them in late October and a few on the tree were still delicious, but most had fallen. Much like a gravenstein in crispness and flavor. Access: Public.

Wild Blackberries on side of road, set back 15+ feet and more.  Public and private wetlands beyond immediate access areas if you want to move deeper. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: August-September.
